response.justification: Bogdan is a polyglot staff-level engineer with 15+ years of progressive experience and a strong TypeScript/Node.js/React background that maps directly to the primary stack. His current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling — a direct hit on the often-hard-to-find AI agent development requirement — and the GISCollective platform demonstrates sustained full-stack ownership including Kubernetes deployments. The main gaps are no explicit Nest.js experience and thin Kotlin/Java depth, but neither is a dealbreaker given his breadth and demonstrated ability to adopt new frameworks.
strengths: Production TypeScript/Node.js/React across multiple senior and staff roles, with AWS CDK and MongoDB experience covering core stack requirements
Active AI-agent and MCP framework work at current role directly satisfies the AI agent development requirement — rare and highly relevant
Consistent software craftsmanship culture: TDD advocate, organized code kata sessions, contributed to testing tooling, and practiced trunk-based development with CI/CD
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the resume — it is the primary backend framework for this role and no equivalent structured framework experience is cited
Kotlin/Java exposure is minimal (robotic arms at Altom) — the secondary backend services stack is underrepresented relative to the job requirements
No explicit mention of Jest, Vitest, or Playwright despite a strong TDD background — testing framework alignment to the stated stack is unverified
